title: rubus × pseudoschlechtendalii
intro: Rubus × pseudoschlechtendalii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudoschlechtendalii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal uses, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
